title: Intense Smoky Mexican Spring Onions Tacos
description: A smoky and velvety Mexican dish featuring spring onions and a mirepoix base, perfect for ovo-vegetarian diets. This show-off dish is sure to impress with its complex flavors and textures.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat and saute the onion, carrots, and celery until they are tender.
Add the chipotle peppers and cook for an additional 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced spring onions to the skillet and cook until they are slightly caramelized.
In a separate bowl, whisk the eggs and season with salt and pepper.
Pour the eggs over the spring onion mixture and scramble them until they are cooked through.
Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the egg and spring onion mixture onto a tortilla and topping with queso fresco and cilantro.
Serve the tacos immediately and enjoy.
Garnish with additional cilantro and spring onions if desired.
